bullets: Catholic faithful in Mozambique grieving the violent killing of a bishop inside his residence amid unresolved insecurity and regional insurgency.
Clergy, displaced communities, and conflict-affected civilians in Cameroon amid decades-long armed violence and ongoing calls for justice and reconciliation.
Civilians across Iran, Israel, and Lebanon amid renewed missile exchanges, airstrikes on residential areas, and a fragile ceasefire at risk of total collapse after 100 days of conflict.
Tens of millions of people in Tehran and across Iran enduring economic collapse, mass job losses, school closures, mass arrests, and a sharp rise in political executions since the conflict began.
Sailors, naval personnel, and civilians near the Sea of Oman and Strait of Hormuz amid escalating U.S.-Iran naval confrontations and disputed interdiction operations.
Displaced Palestinians in Gaza sheltering in tent camps and UN school compounds struck by airstrikes, with women and children among the dead and wounded while ceasefire talks continue.
A Palestinian family in the occupied West Bank grieving the killing of a seven-month-old baby shot while riding in a car, with a mother still hospitalized.
Palestinian civilians in the occupied West Bank facing ongoing settler violence, displacement, and armed raids amid international sanctions on settlement groups.
Residents of Beirut's southern suburbs caught in repeated Israeli airstrikes on apartment buildings amid a nominally active ceasefire.
Lebanese army soldiers and civilians in southern Lebanon killed in Israeli strikes, including senior military officers struck in their vehicle during active combat operations.
Lebanese civilians caught between escalating cross-border hostilities and government warnings that Lebanon is being used as a bargaining chip in outside negotiations.
Civilians across Ukraine facing ongoing drone and missile strikes, including a strike near the Chornobyl nuclear site, with at least four people killed in separate attacks on the same day.
Up to 2,000 trapped residents of a Russian-occupied southern Ukrainian city, mostly elderly people and children, facing famine, landmines, no medical care, and total isolation.
Residents of St Petersburg sheltering during an unprecedented drone attack involving more than 140 intercepted drones, with fires and evacuations reported near a military facility.
Civilians and aid workers in eastern Congo facing armed rebel threats while trying to conduct safe Ebola burials, risking further spread of the outbreak.
Hundreds of thousands of people displaced by months of fighting in South Sudan's eastern region, facing extreme hardship after fleeing their homes and livelihoods.
At least 11 civilians killed and dozens wounded in drone strikes on a market and nearby areas in North Kordofan, Sudan, with additional strikes hitting a fuel station hours later.
Refugees and migrants in the Mediterranean, with nearly 1,000 deaths recorded this year and 10 bodies recovered after a boat capsized off Libya, with survivors rescued from open water.
Bolivian civilians caught between antigovernment protests and new legislation authorizing soldiers to use force against roadblocks, raising fears of violent confrontation.
Former child soldiers in Somalia still living with deep psychological trauma from years of urban warfare and insurgency beginning in adolescence.
Hundreds of detained activists from more than 45 countries held after being intercepted at gunpoint in international waters while sailing in solidarity with people in Gaza.
Hundreds of Tunisian protesters calling for press freedom and the release of political prisoners amid a sustained government crackdown on opposition and journalists.
Thousands of Albanian demonstrators and communities along the Adriatic coast amid protests over a disputed luxury resort development and concerns about environmental damage to protected areas.
Young people and families in India grieving student suicides and demanding accountability after repeated exam paper leaks, marking failures, and widespread job shortages.
Communities in eastern DR Congo and neighboring Uganda amid a spreading Ebola outbreak with hundreds of cases, deaths, overwhelmed contact tracing, and health workers facing hostility and threats.
Residents across the southern Philippines following a significant earthquake, with communities assessing potential damage and disruption.
Coastal communities in southern Italy shaken by a strong deep earthquake, residents processing fear and uncertainty about structural safety.
Farming communities in southern Texas facing the first screwworm parasite outbreak in decades, threatening livestock and livelihoods across the agricultural sector.
Island communities in Timor-Leste following a shallow earthquake, where limited infrastructure increases vulnerability to even moderate seismic events.
Residents near the Kuril Islands of Russia following a shallow offshore earthquake in one of the world's most seismically active zones.
Island communities across Tonga's northern islands following a shallow earthquake in a remote region where residents depend on fishing and subsistence farming.
Pacific island communities across Fiji following multiple deep earthquakes, residents living with ongoing seismic uncertainty in an active tectonic zone.
